scope: Observed Marketing workflows only. This is evidence of current practice, not a legal interpretation, approval, or compliance conclusion. Nothing in this file states whether a practice is compliant — that is the agent's job, and it must be done against a supplied requirement pack.

evidence_handling.redaction_policy: Evidence references identify only synthetic system exports and configuration records.

practice_records.consent_method: Unchecked affirmative opt-in checkbox specific to promotional email
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-CMP-EXPORT-2026-07: consent timestamp and form version retained per contact
practice_records.retention: 24 months after last engagement, subject to approved retention process
practice_records.opt_out_process: One-click unsubscribe in every message; suppression list checked before every send

practice_records.lawful_basis: commercial marketing workflow basis not documented in this fixture
practice_records.consent_method: Partner registration record supplied without unsubscribe configuration
practice_records.opt_out_process: No unsubscribe mechanism configured; sending workflow does not query a suppression list

practice_records.consent_method: Practice owner reports consent is collected

practice_records.purpose: Scheduled landing-page campaign with quantified performance claim
practice_records.lawful_basis: not applicable to the claim-approval control
practice_records.consent_method: not applicable to the claim-approval control
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-SUBSTANTIATION-2026-07: approved product analytics report exists
practice_records.opt_out_process: not applicable to the claim-approval control

control_evidence.claim_text: Synthetic benchmark campaign claims a 35% faster setup time.

practice_records.purpose: Promotional SMS for Region-B retail subscribers
practice_records.consent_method: Double opt-in confirmed by reply keyword
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-REGION-B-SMS-EXPORT-2026-07: opt-in keyword and timestamp retained per contact
practice_records.opt_out_process: STOP keyword honored; suppression list checked before every send

practice_records.purpose: Retargeting pixel on campaign landing pages
practice_records.consent_method: Consent banner present; configuration export not supplied
practice_records.opt_out_process: Banner offers a reject option; enforcement evidence not supplied

practice_records.consent_method: Unchecked affirmative opt-in checkbox on the lead form
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-CMS-EXPORT-2026-07: form consent state retained per submission
practice_records.opt_out_process: One-click unsubscribe on any follow-up email; suppression list checked before send

check_results.keyboard_navigation: pass — all interactive elements reachable and operable by keyboard
check_results.colour_contrast: pass — all text meets the supplied contrast ratio
check_results.image_alt_text: fail — 6 of 9 campaign images have no alt text attribute

practice_records.purpose: Partner co-marketing campaign records and attribution reporting
practice_records.consent_method: Unchecked affirmative opt-in checkbox on the joint landing page
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-PARTNER-CONSENT-EXPORT-2026-07: consent timestamp and form version retained per contact
practice_records.retention: Campaign records currently configured to retain for 24 months after campaign end, per the partner contract
practice_records.opt_out_process: One-click unsubscribe in every message; suppression list checked before every send

practice_records.purpose: Lifecycle promotional email with centralized opt-out processing
practice_records.consent_method: Unchecked affirmative opt-in checkbox specific to promotional email
practice_records.consent_evidence: SYNTHETIC-CMP-EXPORT-2026-07: consent timestamp and form version retained per contact
practice_records.opt_out_process: Unsubscribe requests are queued and applied to the suppression list by a batch job that runs every 8 days; suppression list is checked before every send

control_evidence.operational_evidence: SYNTHETIC-SUPPRESSION-JOB-LOG-2026-07: batch job run history showing a median 8-day and maximum 8-day application time across the last 90 days
control_evidence.measurement_basis: time from unsubscribe request receipt to suppression-list application
